name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench, grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder-width, lower to mid-chest, press up to lockout.

name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Set bench to 30-45 degrees, grip bar slightly wider than shoulders, lower to upper chest, press up.

name: Decline Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Set bench to decline, grip bar slightly wider than shoulders, lower to lower chest, press up.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench holding dumbbells at chest level, press up until arms are extended, lower with control.

name: Incline Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Set bench to 30-45 degrees, press dumbbells from upper chest to full extension overhead.

name: Dumbbell Fly
instructions: Lie on a flat bench, hold dumbbells above chest with slight elbow bend, lower in an arc to the sides, squeeze back up.

name: Cable Fly
instructions: Set cables at shoulder height, step forward, bring handles together in front of chest with slight elbow bend.

name: Machine Chest Press
instructions: Adjust seat so handles are at mid-chest height, press forward to full extension, return with control.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Place hands shoulder-width apart, lower chest to the floor keeping body straight, push back up.

name: Dip (Chest)
instructions: On parallel bars, lean forward slightly, lower until upper arms are parallel to floor, press back up.

name: Pec Deck Machine
instructions: Sit with back flat against pad, bring arms together in front of chest using machine pads.

name: Barbell Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width, grip bar outside knees, drive through heels keeping back flat, stand up to lockout.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Hinge at hips, grip bar slightly wider than shoulders, pull to lower chest, lower with control.

name: Dumbbell Row
instructions: Place one knee and hand on bench, row dumbbell to hip with opposite arm, squeeze shoulder blade.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Hang from bar with overhand grip, pull chin above bar by driving elbows down, lower with control.

name: Chin-Up
instructions: Hang from bar with underhand grip, pull chin above bar, lower with control.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Grip wide bar attachment, sit with thighs under pad, pull bar to upper chest, return slowly.

name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Sit upright, pull handle to lower chest squeezing shoulder blades together, extend arms with control.

name: T-Bar Row
instructions: Straddle the bar, grip handle, hinge at hips, pull bar to chest, lower with control.

name: Face Pull
instructions: Set cable at face height with rope attachment, pull toward face with elbows high, squeeze rear delts.

name: Machine Row
instructions: Sit with chest against pad, pull handles back squeezing shoulder blades, return with control.

name: Rack Pull
instructions: Set bar at knee height in rack, grip and stand up driving hips forward, lower to pins.

name: Straight-Arm Pulldown
instructions: Stand facing cable with bar at top, keeping arms straight pull bar down to thighs, return slowly.

name: Overhead Press
instructions: Stand with bar at shoulder height, press overhead to lockout, lower under control.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit or stand, hold dumbbells at shoulder height, press overhead to full extension, lower with control.

name: Arnold Press
instructions: Start with palms facing you at shoulder height, rotate palms outward as you press overhead.

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells at sides, raise arms to shoulder height with slight elbow bend, lower slowly.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand beside low cable, raise arm to shoulder height with slight elbow bend, lower with control.

name: Front Raise
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells in front of thighs, raise one or both arms to shoulder height, lower slowly.

name: Reverse Fly
instructions: Hinge at hips, hold dumbbells below chest, raise arms to sides squeezing rear delts, lower slowly.

name: Machine Shoulder Press
instructions: Adjust seat so handles are at shoulder height, press up to full extension, lower with control.

name: Upright Row
instructions: Hold bar with narrow grip in front of thighs, pull up to chin level leading with elbows, lower slowly.

name: Shrug
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides, elevate shoulders toward ears, hold briefly, lower with control.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Stand holding bar with underhand grip at hip width, curl to shoulders keeping elbows at sides, lower slowly.

name: EZ-Bar Curl
instructions: Hold EZ-bar on the angled grips, curl to shoulders keeping elbows stationary, lower with control.

name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells at sides, curl to shoulders alternating or together, lower slowly.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Hold dumbbells with neutral grip (palms facing each other), curl to shoulders, lower with control.

name: Concentration Curl
instructions: Sit on bench, brace elbow against inner thigh, curl dumbbell to shoulder, lower slowly.

name: Preacher Curl
instructions: Rest upper arms on preacher pad, curl bar to shoulders, lower with full extension.

name: Cable Curl
instructions: Stand facing low cable with bar attachment, curl to shoulders, lower with control.

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Sit on incline bench, let arms hang, curl dumbbells to shoulders with palms up, lower slowly.

name: Machine Bicep Curl
instructions: Sit on curl machine, place arms on pad, curl handle to shoulders, lower with control.

name: Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Stand at cable machine with bar or rope at top, push down until arms are extended, return slowly.

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Hold dumbbell overhead with both hands, lower behind head by bending elbows, extend back up.

name: Skull Crusher
instructions: Lie on bench, hold EZ-bar above forehead, lower to forehead by bending elbows, extend back up.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
instructions: Lie on bench with hands shoulder-width apart, lower bar to chest, press up focusing on triceps.

name: Tricep Dip
instructions: On parallel bars, keep torso upright, lower until elbows at 90 degrees, press back up.

name: Cable Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Face away from low cable with rope, extend arms overhead from behind the head.

name: Tricep Kickback
instructions: Hinge forward, hold dumbbell with elbow at 90 degrees, extend arm straight back, return slowly.

name: Diamond Push-Up
instructions: Place hands together forming a diamond shape, perform push-up keeping elbows close to body.

name: Machine Tricep Extension
instructions: Sit at machine, place arms on pad, extend arms fully, return with control.

name: Barbell Squat
instructions: Bar on upper back, feet shoulder-width, squat until thighs are parallel, drive up through heels.

name: Front Squat
instructions: Hold bar across front delts, squat keeping torso upright until thighs are parallel, drive up.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Sit in leg press machine, place feet shoulder-width on platform, lower until 90 degrees, press up.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold bar at hip height, hinge at hips pushing them back, lower bar along legs to shin, return to standing.

name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold dumbbells at hips, hinge at hips keeping back flat, lower to shin level, squeeze glutes to stand.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Rear foot on bench, hold dumbbells at sides, lower until front thigh is parallel, drive up.

name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides, step forward into a lunge, drive up and step into the next lunge.

name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold dumbbell vertically at chest, squat between legs keeping torso upright, drive up through heels.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Sit in machine with shins behind pad, extend legs to full lockout, lower with control.

name: Leg Curl
instructions: Lie face down or sit in curl machine, curl pad toward glutes, lower with control.

name: Hack Squat
instructions: Stand on hack squat platform, shoulders under pads, lower until thighs are parallel, drive up.

name: Calf Raise (Standing)
instructions: Stand on calf raise machine with shoulders under pads, rise onto toes, lower heels below platform.

name: Seated Calf Raise
instructions: Sit with knees under pad, rise onto toes squeezing calves, lower heels below platform level.

name: Hip Thrust
instructions: Sit against bench with bar over hips, drive hips up squeezing glutes at top, lower with control.

name: Sumo Deadlift
instructions: Wide stance with toes pointed out, grip bar inside knees, drive through heels to stand, lockout hips.

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Hinge at hips, swing kettlebell between legs, snap hips forward to swing to chest height.

name: Step-Up
instructions: Hold dumbbells, step onto a bench or box with one foot, drive up to standing, step down with control.

name: Bodyweight Squat
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width, squat down keeping chest up, drive through heels to stand.

name: Pistol Squat
instructions: Stand on one leg, extend the other in front, squat down on the standing leg, drive up to full extension.

name: Plank
instructions: Hold a push-up position on forearms, keep body in a straight line from head to heels, brace core.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Hang from pull-up bar, raise legs to 90 degrees keeping them straight, lower with control.

name: Cable Crunch
instructions: Kneel facing cable with rope behind head, crunch down bringing elbows to knees, return slowly.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: Kneel on floor, grip ab wheel, roll forward extending body, pull back to starting position using core.

name: Russian Twist
instructions: Sit with knees bent, lean back slightly, rotate torso side to side touching the floor beside hips.

name: Mountain Climber
instructions: In push-up position, drive knees alternately toward chest at a fast pace.

name: Bicycle Crunch
instructions: Lie on back, bring opposite elbow to knee while extending the other leg, alternate sides.

name: Dead Bug
instructions: Lie on back with arms and legs raised, lower opposite arm and leg toward floor, return and alternate.

name: Side Plank
instructions: Lie on side propped on forearm, lift hips forming a straight line, hold position bracing core.

name: Pallof Press
instructions: Stand sideways to cable, hold handle at chest, press arms straight forward resisting rotation, return.

name: Cable Woodchop
instructions: Set cable high, grip handle with both hands, chop diagonally across body rotating torso, return slowly.

name: Decline Sit-Up
instructions: Hook feet on decline bench, lie back, curl torso up toward knees, lower with control.

name: Treadmill Running
instructions: Set desired speed and incline, maintain steady pace with upright posture.

name: Stationary Bike
instructions: Adjust seat height, pedal at a steady cadence maintaining desired resistance level.

name: Rowing Machine
instructions: Drive with legs first, then lean back and pull handle to lower chest, reverse the sequence to return.

name: Elliptical
instructions: Grip handles, move feet in elliptical motion maintaining upright posture and steady pace.

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Hold rope handles, swing over head and jump with both feet, land softly on balls of feet.

name: Battle Rope
instructions: Hold rope ends, create alternating waves by rapidly raising and lowering arms.

name: Stairmaster
instructions: Stand upright, step at a consistent pace, avoid leaning on handrails.

name: Kettlebell Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold kettlebell by horns at chest, squat deep keeping elbows between knees, drive up through heels.

name: Kettlebell Clean and Press
instructions: Clean kettlebell to rack position, press overhead to lockout, lower and repeat.

name: Kettlebell Turkish Get-Up
instructions: Lie down holding kettlebell overhead, stand up through a series of controlled movements, reverse to return.

name: Kettlebell Snatch
instructions: Swing kettlebell between legs, drive hips forward and pull bell overhead in one motion, lock out arm.

name: Resistance Band Pull-Apart
instructions: Hold band at shoulder width with arms extended, pull apart until band touches chest, return slowly.

name: Resistance Band Bicep Curl
instructions: Stand on band, hold ends with underhand grip, curl hands to shoulders, lower with control.

name: Resistance Band Squat
instructions: Stand on band with feet shoulder-width, hold at shoulders, squat and drive up against resistance.

name: Resistance Band Lateral Walk
instructions: Place band around ankles, stand in quarter squat, step sideways maintaining tension, repeat.

name: Resistance Band Tricep Extension
instructions: Anchor band overhead, grip with both hands behind head, extend arms upward, return slowly.

name: Barbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Upper back on bench, bar across hips, drive hips up squeezing glutes at top, lower with control.

name: Landmine Press
instructions: Hold end of barbell at shoulder with one hand, press up and forward to full extension, lower slowly.

name: Landmine Row
instructions: Straddle barbell end, hinge at hips, row the bar to chest with both hands, lower with control.

name: Dumbbell Pullover
instructions: Lie across bench, hold dumbbell overhead, lower behind head with slight arm bend, pull back over chest.

name: Good Morning
instructions: Bar on upper back, hinge at hips pushing them back, lower torso until near parallel, return to standing.

name: Power Clean
instructions: Start at floor, drive through legs, shrug and pull bar up, catch in front rack position at shoulders.

name: Barbell Snatch
instructions: Wide grip, lift from floor, explosively extend hips, pull bar overhead, catch in squat position.

name: Thruster
instructions: Front squat then drive up pressing bar overhead in one smooth motion, lower and repeat.

name: Burpee
instructions: Drop to floor, perform push-up, jump feet forward, explode up jumping with hands overhead.

name: Box Jump
instructions: Stand facing box, swing arms and jump onto box landing softly with bent knees, step down.

name: Jump Squat
instructions: Squat down then explode upward jumping as high as possible, land softly and repeat.

name: Tuck Jump
instructions: Jump vertically, tuck knees to chest at the peak, extend legs to land softly.

name: Seated Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Sit on bench, hold dumbbells at sides with palms up, curl to shoulders alternating arms, lower slowly.

name: Chest Supported Row
instructions: Lie chest down on incline bench, row dumbbells up squeezing shoulder blades together, lower slowly.

name: Single-Arm Cable Row
instructions: Stand facing cable, pull handle with one arm to hip rotating torso slightly, return slowly.

name: Incline Dumbbell Fly
instructions: Lie on incline bench, hold dumbbells above with slight bend, lower in arc to sides, squeeze back up.

name: Close-Grip Lat Pulldown
instructions: Use narrow grip attachment, pull to upper chest squeezing lats, return with control.

name: Reverse Grip Barbell Row
instructions: Hinge at hips, grip bar underhand shoulder-width, pull to lower chest, lower with control.

name: Dumbbell Lateral Lunge
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides, step wide to one side bending that knee, push back to standing.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on back with knees bent, drive hips up squeezing glutes at top, lower with control.

name: Leg Raise
instructions: Lie flat on back, raise legs to 90 degrees keeping them straight, lower slowly without touching floor.

name: V-Up
instructions: Lie flat, simultaneously raise legs and torso reaching hands toward feet forming a V, lower slowly.

name: Farmer's Walk
instructions: Hold heavy dumbbells at sides, walk with upright posture and controlled steps for distance or time.

name: Dumbbell Shrug
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides, elevate shoulders toward ears, hold briefly at top, lower with control.

name: Barbell Shrug
instructions: Hold barbell at thigh level with overhand grip, shrug shoulders toward ears, hold, lower slowly.

name: Spider Curl
instructions: Lie chest down on incline bench, let arms hang, curl dumbbells up squeezing biceps, lower slowly.

name: Reverse Curl
instructions: Hold bar with overhand grip, curl to shoulders keeping elbows at sides, lower with control.

name: Wrist Curl
instructions: Rest forearms on bench with wrists hanging over edge, curl bar up using wrist flexion, lower slowly.

name: Dumbbell Overhead Press (Standing)
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells at shoulder height, press overhead to full extension bracing core, lower slowly.

name: Machine Lateral Raise
instructions: Sit in machine with arms against pads, raise arms to shoulder height, lower with control.

name: Cable Face Pull
instructions: Set cable at face height with rope, pull toward face with elbows high and wide, squeeze rear delts.

name: Kettlebell Row
instructions: Hinge at hips, row kettlebell to hip, squeeze shoulder blade, lower with control.

name: Dumbbell Reverse Fly
instructions: Bend over holding dumbbells, raise arms to sides with slight elbow bend, squeeze rear delts, lower.

name: Lat Prayer Stretch
instructions: Kneel, place hands on surface, push hips back stretching lats, hold for 20-30 seconds.

name: Chest Stretch
instructions: Stand in doorway, place forearms on frame, lean forward stretching chest, hold for 20-30 seconds.

name: Hip Flexor Stretch
instructions: Kneel on one knee, push hips forward while keeping torso upright, hold for 20-30 seconds per side.

name: Hamstring Stretch
instructions: Stand and extend one leg on a low surface, hinge at hips keeping back flat, hold for 20-30 seconds.

name: Shoulder Stretch
instructions: Cross one arm across chest, use opposite hand to press it closer, hold for 20-30 seconds per side.

name: Resistance Band Face Pull
instructions: Anchor band at face height, grip with both hands, pull toward face with elbows high, squeeze rear delts.

name: Resistance Band Chest Press
instructions: Anchor band behind you at chest height, press forward until arms are extended, return with control.

name: Resistance Band Row
instructions: Anchor band at chest height, pull toward body squeezing shoulder blades, return slowly.

name: Machine Leg Press (Single Leg)
instructions: Place one foot on platform, press until leg is extended, lower with control, repeat on other side.

name: Smith Machine Squat
instructions: Stand in Smith machine with bar on upper back, squat until thighs parallel, press up.

name: Cable Pull-Through
instructions: Face away from low cable, grip rope between legs, hinge forward, snap hips to stand squeezing glutes.

name: Inverted Row
instructions: Hang under a bar with feet on floor, pull chest to bar squeezing shoulder blades, lower slowly.

name: Dumbbell Floor Press
instructions: Lie on floor with dumbbells, press up from a dead stop at the bottom, lower until triceps touch floor.
